# YTGrowth

> AI-powered analytics and growth tools for YouTube creators. YTGrowth audits
> your channel, tells you exactly what's holding it back, and turns the same
> data VidIQ and TubeBuddy show you into a prioritized action plan you can
> work through in an hour.

## What it is

YTGrowth (https://ytgrowth.io) is a SaaS platform for YouTube creators
who want to grow their channel without spending hours interpreting
analytics. Connect your YouTube channel via Google OAuth and the platform
performs a 10-dimension audit covering traffic sources, audience
demographics, posting patterns, click-through rate, retention, engagement
quality, content strategy, SEO discovery, thumbnail health, and competitor
positioning. The output is a ranked list of fixes — not another dashboard
you have to interpret.

The product positions itself as "the AI that audits your channel like a
$500/hour consultant." It targets the gap between raw-analytics tools
(VidIQ, TubeBuddy, Social Blade) and personal coaching, by automating the
interpretation step that most creators outsource.

## Who it's for

- Solo YouTubers (1K–100K subscribers) trying to grow without a team.
- Multi-channel agencies managing 3–10 client channels in one workspace.
- Faceless / niche-channel operators optimising for reliable growth.
- Coaches and consultants using it as a diagnostic on client channels.
- Creators who are tired of vanity-metric dashboards and want to know
  what to do next.

## Core features

- **Channel Audit** — A 10-dimension AI audit of your channel: traffic
  sources, device split, audience demographics, posting cadence, CTR,
  retention curves, engagement quality, content-strategy fit, SEO
  discovery, thumbnail health, and benchmarking against your real
  competitors. Returns a prioritized action list with severity tags.

- **Competitor Analysis** — You pick 2–10 channels in your niche.
  YTGrowth analyzes their last 30+ uploads and surfaces the patterns
  that explain why they're outperforming you (titles, thumbnails,
  posting times, topic mix, hook style).

- **SEO Studio** — Title and description optimizer that scores against
  search demand, keyword fit, hook strength, length, and competitor
  patterns. Suggests rewrites you can apply with one click via the
  YouTube Data API.

- **Thumbnail IQ** — Two-layer thumbnail scoring: an algorithmic CTR
  prediction plus a vision model checking text contrast, face/object
  placement, emotion, and composition against high-performing
  thumbnails in your niche.

- **Keyword Explorer** — Search volume, competition score, and ranking
  difficulty for any topic. Surfaces low-competition / high-intent
  keywords that creators in your niche are missing.

- **Video Ideas** — Generates ideas based on your channel's existing
  performance patterns, trending topics, and competitor gaps. Each idea
  comes with a working title, target keyword, and rationale.

- **Title Optimizer** — Quick A/B-style scoring of title variants against
  search and click-through models.

- **Post-Publish Review** — Within 24 hours of a new upload, a focused
  audit of how that specific video is performing relative to your
  channel baseline and what to fix on the next one.

- **Weekly Reports** — Automated email digest of channel performance,
  upcoming opportunities, and what to publish next.

- **Multi-channel support** — Manage up to 10 channels under one account
  on the Agency plan, with pooled credits.

## Pricing

Free tier:
- 1 channel · 3 lifetime AI analyses · limited Thumbnail IQ ·
  view-only Keyword Explorer · no Competitor Analysis.

Solo — $19/month or $190/year (~$15.83/month equivalent):
- 3 channels · 20 AI analyses/month · full SEO Studio · full Keyword
  Explorer · Title Optimizer · Video Ideas · Competitor Analysis
  (2 rivals) · standard Thumbnail IQ.

Growth — $49/month or $490/year:
- 5 channels · 50 AI analyses/month · everything in Solo plus weekly
  email reports · Competitor Analysis (5 rivals) · increased
  Thumbnail IQ credits.

Agency — $149/month or $1,490/year:
- 10 pooled channels · 150 AI analyses/month · everything in Growth
  plus priority support · Competitor Analysis (10 rivals) · maximum
  Thumbnail IQ credits.

Lifetime variants of each tier are available as one-time purchases
(Solo $149, Growth $169, Agency $949). Top-up packs (20 / 60 / 150
analyses) sit on top of any plan and never expire.

## Affiliate program

30% recurring commission on every payment for as long as a referred
customer stays subscribed. 30-day cookie window, $50 payout minimum,
monthly via PayPal or bank transfer. Open to all creators, no approval
required, instant link generation. Sign up at
https://affiliates.ytgrowth.io.

## How it differs from VidIQ and TubeBuddy

VidIQ and TubeBuddy show you data and let you interpret it. YTGrowth runs
an AI audit on top of the same data and tells you specifically what to
change, in what order, and why. The Channel Audit alone replaces the kind
of report a YouTube growth consultant would charge $300–$500 for.
